content.full_text:
STATE OF CALIFORNIA
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
1102 Q Street • Suite 3000 • Sacramento, CA 95811
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

July 25, 2017

Raul Salgado #F-S7811
C7-107
P.O. Box 5246
Corcoran, CA 93212

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-17-175

Dear Mr. Salgado:

This letter is in response to your request letter dated July, 17, 2017. Unfortunately, none of the issues raised in your letter are within the jurisdiction of the Commission. Thus, we are unable to provide any assistance. You may consider contacting Corcoran City officials.

Sincerely,

John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

JWW:jgl

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission of California, dated July 25, 2017, addressed to Raul Salgado at Corcoran City. The Commission responds to Mr. Salgado's request for advice regarding an issue he raised in his letter dated July 17, 2017. The Commission states that none of the issues raised fall within its jurisdiction, and thus it cannot provide any assistance. Mr. Salgado is advised to contact Corcoran City officials for further information. The letter is signed by John W. Wallace, Assistant General Counsel of the Legal Division, and includes a signature stamp. The file number referenced in the letter is W-17-175.
